parameters.subject: Welcome to Current Bahamas — next steps
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json['Contact Name'] }},

Welcome to Current Bahamas. Here is what happens next:

1. We will review your compliance status and send you a first snapshot within 5 business days.
2. Your documents should go into the shared Google Drive folder (link coming separately).
3. Any questions — reply to this email or WhatsApp us.

Stay current,
Current Bahamas
hello@currentbahamas.com

parameters.subject: New client onboarded: {{ $json['Business Name'] }}
